description: Используется для переключения или фильтрации контента.

examples.title: Размеры и стили
examples.description: Для контрола доступно два размера и два вида скруглений.
examples.desktop:
render(() => { const [selectedId, setSelectedId] = React.useState({ '1': 1, '2': 1, '3': 1, '4': 1, }); const handleChange = (pos, id) => setSelectedId({ ...selectedId, [pos]: id }); return (
handleChange('1', id)} selectedId={selectedId["1"]}> handleChange('2', id)} selectedId={selectedId["2"]}> handleChange('3', id)} selectedId={selectedId["3"]}> handleChange('4', id)} selectedId={selectedId["4"]}>
) })
examples.mobile:
render(() => {
const [selectedId, setSelectedId] = React.useState({
'1': 1,
'2': 1,
'3': 1,
'4': 1,
});
const handleChange = (pos, id) => setSelectedId({ ...selectedId, [pos]: id });
return (
<Space fullWidth size={24}>
<SegmentedControl size={40} onChange={(id) => handleChange('1', id)} selectedId={selectedId["1"]}>
<Segment id={1} title='Таб 1' />
<Segment id={2} title='Таб 2' />
</SegmentedControl>
<SegmentedControl onChange={(id) => handleChange('2', id)} selectedId={selectedId["2"]}>
<Segment id={1} title='Таб 1' />
<Segment id={2} title='Таб 2' />
</SegmentedControl>
<SegmentedControl size={40} shape='rounded' onChange={(id) => handleChange('3', id)} selectedId={selectedId["3"]}>
<Segment id={1} title='Таб 1' />
<Segment id={2} title='Таб 2' />
</SegmentedControl>
<SegmentedControl shape='rounded' onChange={(id) => handleChange('4', id)} selectedId={selectedId["4"]}>
<Segment id={1} title='Таб 1' />
<Segment id={2} title='Таб 2' />
</SegmentedControl>
</Space>
)
})

examples.title: Количество сегментов
examples.description: Контрол может содержать от двух до пяти сегментов.
examples.desktop:
render(() => { const [selectedId, setSelectedId] = React.useState({ '1': 1, '2': 1, '3': 1, '4': 1, '5': 1, }); const handleChange = (pos, id) => setSelectedId({ ...selectedId, [pos]: id }); return (
handleChange('1', id)}> handleChange('2', id)}> handleChange('3', id)}> handleChange('4', id)}>
) })
examples.mobile:
render(() => {
const [selectedId, setSelectedId] = React.useState({
'1': 1,
'2': 1,
'3': 1,
'4': 1,
'5': 1,
});
const handleChange = (pos, id) => setSelectedId({ ...selectedId, [pos]: id });
return (
<Space fullWidth size={24}>
<SegmentedControl selectedId={selectedId["1"]} onChange={(id) => handleChange('1', id)}>
<Segment id={1} title='Таб 1' />
<Segment id={2} title='Таб 2' />
</SegmentedControl>
<SegmentedControl selectedId={selectedId["2"]} onChange={(id) => handleChange('2', id)}>
<Segment id={1} title='Таб 1' />
<Segment id={2} title='Таб 2' />
<Segment id={3} title='Таб 3' />
</SegmentedControl>
<SegmentedControl selectedId={selectedId["3"]} onChange={(id) => handleChange('3', id)}>
<Segment id={1} title='Таб 1' />
<Segment id={2} title='Таб 2' />
<Segment id={3} title='Таб 3' />
<Segment id={4} title='Таб 4' />
</SegmentedControl>
<SegmentedControl selectedId={selectedId["4"]} onChange={(id) => handleChange('4', id)}>
<Segment id={1} title='Таб 1' />
<Segment id={2} title='Таб 2' />
<Segment id={3} title='Таб 3' />
<Segment id={4} title='Таб 4' />
<Segment id={5} title='Таб 5' />
</SegmentedControl>
</Space>
)
})

examples.title: Заголовки сегментов
examples.description: Сегменты могут содержать как строковые значения, так и React компоненты
